question:
[Previous Feedback] A: Confirmed by order-history-618.md (order JD-618-2026-7891234, SKU GPU-A100-80G, 2026-06-18 10:02:33, ¥72,999.00). B: Confirmed by payment-records.md (2026-06-18 10:02:45, ¥72,999.00). C: Confirmed by package-tracking-log.md (first shipment dispatch and sign times). D: All three shipments confirmed in package-tracking-log.md with same warehouse and label text. E: Only one RMA exists in order-history-618.md.

Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and product-listing-screenshot.md, which of the following statements about the product substitution pattern are supported by documentary evidence?
A. The order system records SKU GPU-A100-80G (A100 80GB), but all three logistics internal codes show GPU-A40-48G (A40 48GB) — a systematic mismatch across every shipment.
B. The product listing screenshot (截图1) taken at 2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST — 2 minutes before ordering — shows the A100 listed at ¥72,999.00 with no 'product substitution' or 'same-series replacement' clause.
C. The shipping labels deliberately use the vague description 'NVIDIA 专业显卡' without specifying the exact GPU model, which obscures the product code mismatch from the recipient.
D. All three shipments originated from '上海松江仓储中心' — the same warehouse — ruling out a warehouse routing error as the explanation.
E. The partial refund of ¥32,000.00 (visible in payment-records.md) matches the A40's approximate market price, not the ¥72,999.00 paid for the A100.
F. The internal code field (GPU-A40-48G) is visible to buyers on the standard delivery tracking page.

\nSelect all correct statements, and answer with \bbox{X,Y,...} format directly.

content.text:
[Previous Feedback] A: Confirmed by order-history-618.md (order JD-618-2026-7891234, SKU GPU-A100-80G, 2026-06-18 10:02:33, ¥72,999.00). B: Confirmed by payment-records.md (2026-06-18 10:02:45, ¥72,999.00). C: Confirmed by package-tracking-log.md (first shipment dispatch and sign times). D: All three shipments confirmed in package-tracking-log.md with same warehouse and label text. E: Only one RMA exists in order-history-618.md.

Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and product-listing-screenshot.md, which of the following statements about the product substitution pattern are supported by documentary evidence?
A. The order system records SKU GPU-A100-80G (A100 80GB), but all three logistics internal codes show GPU-A40-48G (A40 48GB) — a systematic mismatch across every shipment.
B. The product listing screenshot (截图1) taken at 2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST — 2 minutes before ordering — shows the A100 listed at ¥72,999.00 with no 'product substitution' or 'same-series replacement' clause.
C. The shipping labels deliberately use the vague description 'NVIDIA 专业显卡' without specifying the exact GPU model, which obscures the product code mismatch from the recipient.
D. All three shipments originated from '上海松江仓储中心' — the same warehouse — ruling out a warehouse routing error as the explanation.
E. The partial refund of ¥32,000.00 (visible in payment-records.md) matches the A40's approximate market price, not the ¥72,999.00 paid for the A100.
F. The internal code field (GPU-A40-48G) is visible to buyers on the standard delivery tracking page.

\nSelect all correct statements, and answer with \bbox{X,Y,...} format directly.
